title: Beller2025Multimodal
description: Plinko demonstrations expose a falling ball, obstacles, and landing regions to establish the physical behavior of the machine.

formulas.name: Categorical task score
formulas.detail: Exact agreement with an objective answer, or with the modal human answer when the target is a response distribution.

formulas.name: Slider task score
formulas.detail: Range-normalized absolute-error score; raw MAE and RMSE remain available per study.

formulas.name: Multi-select task score
formulas.detail: Set F1 over selected option indices.

formulas.name: Identity quality
formulas.formula: |predicted IDs intersection expected IDs| / |predicted IDs union expected IDs|
formulas.detail: Jaccard agreement against the README and manifest object contract.

formulas.name: Temporal mask coverage
formulas.detail: Measures sustained mask support rather than frame-zero detection.

formulas.name: Symbolic center quality
formulas.detail: Applied only when independent, frame-aligned symbolic center trajectories exist.

formulas.name: Relation and event quality
formulas.formula: |predicted labels intersection target labels| / |predicted labels union target labels|
formulas.detail: Label-set Jaccard agreement, applied only when independent symbolic relation or event labels exist.

formulas.name: Camera quality
formulas.detail: Projection and unprojection must agree within the 1.5-pixel acceptance scale.

formulas.name: Lifted point support
formulas.detail: Requires geometry to be supported by SAM-mask pixels lifted through VGGT-Omega.

formulas.name: Kabsch rigidity quality
formulas.detail: Scores accepted local SE(3) estimates against the rigid-consistency residual threshold.

formulas.name: Hamrick Sim(3) center quality
formulas.detail: Prediction geometry is aligned to hidden tower geometry for evaluation only; GT never repairs the code.

formulas.name: Hamrick Sim(3) size quality
formulas.detail: Uses the accepted 0.25 relative-size error scale after diagnostic Sim(3) alignment.

formulas.name: Hamrick Sim(3) orientation quality
formulas.detail: Uses the accepted 30-degree orientation error scale after diagnostic Sim(3) alignment.

formulas.name: Internal 4D quality
formulas.detail: GT-referenced metrics are excluded; unsupported or not-applicable metrics remain null.

formulas.name: GT quality
formulas.detail: Reported separately from internal consistency and only where an independent comparison target exists.

formulas.name: Quality coverage
formulas.detail: Prevents a high score over a small measurable subset from being mistaken for complete evaluation.

formulas.name: 4D-code confidence
formulas.formula: C_code(q) = min over required evidence-group scores
formulas.detail: Each evidence group is also minimized across every code required by the question; missing evidence is zero.

formulas.name: LLM answer confidence
formulas.formula: p_i = exp(z_i / T) / sum_j exp(z_j / T)
formulas.detail: The selected answer likelihood uses five-fold out-of-fold temperature scaling when calibration is supported.

formulas.name: Human slider reliability
formulas.detail: Spearman-Brown corrected split-half reliability over 200 deterministic response splits.

formulas.name: Human categorical reliability
formulas.detail: Agreement of modal categorical responses across 200 deterministic participant splits.

formulas.name: Routing gap
formulas.formula: oracle-tool task score - native-tool task score
formulas.detail: The 95% interval uses 1,000 grouped bootstrap resamples by experiment.
